name: Mass Defensive Promo (Target + Amazon)
description: Defend mass volume after competitor price drop on key sunscreen SKUs.
impact_summary: Higher sell-through, lower short-term margin, better week-17 inventory position.
business_rationale: Volume defense when competitors undercut in mass channels.

name: Prestige Hold During Social Spike
description: Hold prestige pricing when social engagement is elevated to maximize margin.
impact_summary: Lower promo spend and stable units due lower effective elasticity.
business_rationale: High social pull supports hold-price strategy in prestige channels.

name: Sunscreen Summer Launch Push
description: Short burst promo on hero sunscreen SKUs to capture early-season demand.
impact_summary: Improves new-customer inflow and accelerates week-by-week sell-through.
business_rationale: Use early seasonal intent to pull forward demand on high-elastic SKUs.

name: Post-Promo Step-Up (Mass Channels)
description: After two high-promo weeks, step price up by 8% and track delayed repeat-risk.
impact_summary: Higher near-term margin but elevated repeat-risk window 8-12 weeks later.
business_rationale: Tests margin recovery after volume-heavy phase while quantifying delayed repeat-risk.

name: Prestige Reprice With Competitor Softness
description: Raise prestige price by 7% when competitors hold full price and social remains supportive.
impact_summary: Captures higher AOV with controlled repeat-risk under favorable external signals.
business_rationale: Converts social halo and stable competitor pricing into margin without broad discounting.

name: Markdown Extension to Protect Repeat
description: Extend moderate markdown for one additional window to reduce late-cycle repeat-risk.
impact_summary: Lower immediate price realization but better repeat stability through week 17.
business_rationale: Balances clearance and repeat behavior by avoiding abrupt post-promo step-ups.

name: Sunscreen SKU-1 Capture Strategy
description: Cut hero sunscreen SKU-1 price to pull competitor volume and monitor internal cannibalization from SKU-2/SKU-3.
impact_summary: Stronger competitor capture but risk of volume migration away from premium adjacent SKUs.
business_rationale: Directly tests the meeting requirement: competitor pull vs within-group SKU cannibalization.

name: Moisturizer Prestige Shield
description: Selective prestige markdown on moisturizer hero SKUs while holding mass pricing.
impact_summary: Supports premium conversion and protects margin where social pull is strongest.
business_rationale: Uses social-first demand moments to shift mix toward higher-value moisturizer routes.

name: Gap Compression Across Channels
description: Compress mass-prestige gap and test net route economics before finalizing campaign calendar.
impact_summary: Potentially higher total units with tighter control of downgrade and exit flows.
business_rationale: Tests balanced policy that captures external demand while limiting internal leakage.
